scripts:
set properties on /content/dam/com.example/jcr:content
  set cq:conf{String} to /conf/com.example
  set jcr:title{String} to "Example Site"
end
create service user project-user-system with path system/project-user-system

set ACL for project-user-system
  allow jcr:read,rep:write,jcr:modifyProperties,jcr:addChildNodes,jcr:removeNode,jcr:removeChildNodes on /content
  allow jcr:read on /conf
end
